query:
app.module.ts already registers the profiler with Approach A:
  ConditionalModule.registerWhen(ProfilerModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true }), isProfilerEnabled),
  ConditionalModule.registerWhen(ProfilerNoopModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true }), (env) => !isProfilerEnabled(env)),
The app just added @nestjs/cache-manager and CacheModule.register().

User: Add cache profiling.
expected_behavior: Confirm the base profiler is already set up and note the existing enable strategy is Approach A. Install @eleven-labs/nest-profiler-cache@alpha (no stable release yet — pin the alpha dist-tag). Register CacheCollectorModule.forRoot() AFTER CacheModule, gated with the SAME ConditionalModule.registerWhen(..., isProfilerEnabled) pattern — do not introduce a different enable pattern.

query:
app.module.ts registers the profiler with the enabled flag (Approach B):
  ProfilerModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true, enabled: process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' }),
The app uses mongoose + @nestjs/mongoose with MongooseModule.forRoot(...).

User: Add MongoDB query profiling.
expected_behavior: Confirm the base setup and note the existing strategy is the enabled flag (Approach B). Install @eleven-labs/nest-profiler-mongoose@alpha (no stable release yet — pin the alpha dist-tag) and register MongooseCollectorModule.forRoot({ slowThreshold: 100 }) (slowThreshold, NOT slowQueryThreshold), optionally MongooseSchemaCollectorModule for the model panel. Must MATCH Approach B — do NOT introduce ConditionalModule.registerWhen (that would be a second, inconsistent pattern).

query:
package.json has @nestjs/common, @nestjs/core, typeorm, @nestjs/typeorm but NO @eleven-labs/nest-profiler dependency, and no ProfilerModule anywhere in the codebase.

User: Add the TypeORM profiler collector.
expected_behavior: Detect that the core profiler is NOT installed/configured yet. Should NOT install and wire the collector in isolation. Redirect the user to the setup-nest-profiler skill (which installs the core and can add collectors in the same pass). A collector alone will not work without the core ProfilerModule.

query:
The profiler is set up with Approach A. The app added @golevelup/nestjs-rabbitmq and amqplib and consumes messages via @RabbitSubscribe.

User: Add RabbitMQ message profiling.
expected_behavior: Confirm base setup (Approach A). Install @eleven-labs/nest-profiler-rabbitmq@alpha (no stable release yet — pin the alpha dist-tag) and register RabbitMqCollectorModule.forRoot() in the process that CONSUMES messages (and hosts the profiler), gated with the same isProfilerEnabled pattern. Verify by publishing/consuming a message and checking the RabbitMQ panel.

query:
The profiler is set up with Approach A. The app uses ioredis directly for a custom pub/sub channel (no @nestjs/cache-manager, no @golevelup/nestjs-rabbitmq).

User: Add a collector to profile my Redis pub/sub messages.
expected_behavior: Recognize there is NO dedicated @eleven-labs/nest-profiler-* collector for raw ioredis pub/sub — do not invent a package. Clarify honestly. May suggest alternatives: the cache collector if the app used @nestjs/cache-manager with a Redis store, otherwise building a custom collector / context adapter (out of scope for this skill).
